message:
fix(swarm): nil-result guards in orchestrator, limit detector hardening

Orchestrator (orchestrator.go, orchestrator_test.go):
- Add nil-result guards after session, launch, and injection phases
  in Execute() to prevent nil-pointer panics when upstream phases
  return nil results (e.g., due to context cancellation or unexpected
  provider errors)
- 66 new test lines covering nil session result, nil launch result,
  and nil injection result scenarios

Limit detector (limit_detector.go, limit_detector_test.go):
- StartPane now handles nil context by defaulting to context.Background()
- monitorPane guards against zero CheckInterval to prevent tight-loop
  spinning
- Pattern "exceeded.*limit" changed to literal "limit exceeded" for
  more precise matching (avoids false positives on unrelated log lines
  containing "exceeded" and "limit" separately)
- Tests for nil context, zero check interval, and literal pattern match

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
